Angels are not a concept in [[Lifeism]], but the [[Omega Self]] is somewhat analogous and sometimes takes on an angelic form, especially [[Gabriel]]

However there are some notable things about angels

Gospel is Evangelion in Greek, or Good message. Angel is messenger. So Angel comes off as bringer of the gospel

Angels are notable in [[John Vervaeke]] and Borbin's interpretation of them<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JQsL-yOvB38&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=56&t=84s</ref>

The [[Omega Self]] helps one escape [[existential entrapment]] and is an alternative to ideas of authenticity

== See Also ==

* [[Omega Self]]

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Angels]][[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Angels]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
